1: And David spake unto the LORD LORD the words of this song in the day that that the LORD LORD had delivered him out of the hand of all his enemies, and out of the hand of Saul:
2: The LORD LORD is is my rock, and my fortress, and my deliverer;
3: My saviour; thou savest me from violence.
4: So shall I be saved from mine enemies.
5: The floods of ungodly men made me afraid;
6: The snares of death prevented me;
7: And my cry did enter did enter into his ears.
8: And shook, because he was wroth.
10: And darkness was was under his feet.
11: And he was seen upon the wings of the wind.
12: Dark waters, and and thick clouds of the skies.
14: And the Most High uttered his voice.
16: At the blast of the breath of his nostrils.
17: He drew me out of many waters;
18: And And from them that hated me: for they were too strong for me.
19: But the LORD LORD was my stay.
20: He delivered me, because he delighted in me.
21: According to the cleanness of my hands hath he recompensed me.
22: And have not wickedly departed from my God.
23: And as for as for his statutes, I did not depart from them.
24: And have kept myself from mine iniquity.
25: According to my cleanness in his eye sight.
26: And And with the upright man thou wilt shew thyself upright.
27: And with the froward thou wilt shew thyself unsavoury.
28: But thine eyes are are upon the haughty, that that thou mayest bring them them down.
29: And the LORD LORD will lighten my darkness.
30: By my God have I leaped over a wall.
31: He is is a buckler to all them that trust in him.
32: And who is is a rock, save our God?
33: And he maketh my way perfect.
34: And setteth me upon my high places.
35: So that a bow of steel is broken by mine arms.
36: And thy gentleness hath made me great.
37: So that my feet did not slip.
38: And turned not again until I had consumed them.
39: Yea, they are fallen under my feet.
40: Them that rose up against me hast thou subdued under me.
41: That I might destroy them that hate me.
42: Even Even unto the LORD LORD , but he answered them not.
43: I did stamp them as the mire of the street, and and did spread them abroad.
44: A people which which I knew not shall serve me.
45: As soon as they hear, they shall be obedient unto me.
46: And they shall be afraid out of their close places.
47: And exalted be the God of the rock of my salvation.
48: And that bringeth down the people under me,
49: Thou hast delivered me from the violent man.
50: And I will sing praises unto thy name.
51: Unto David, and to his seed for evermore.
